content.problemStatement:
In C++, 2D arrays are used to represent matrices and perform various operations such as **addition**, **subtraction**, and **transposition**.

---

1. **Matrix Addition**:
Add corresponding elements of two matrices of the same size.

```cpp
matrix3[i][j] = matrix1[i][j] + matrix2[i][j];
```

2. **Matrix Subtraction**:
Subtract corresponding elements of two matrices.

```cpp
matrix3[i][j] = matrix1[i][j] - matrix2[i][j];
```


3. **Matrix Transposition**:
Swap rows and columns of the matrix.

```cpp
transposedMatrix[j][i] = matrix[i][j];
```
